---
name: Task
about: Create a development task
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: ""
---
# Goal

Describe the primary objective of this issue in one or two sentences.

---

# Description

Provide the context and explain why this work is needed.

---

# Scope

This issue includes:

- Components or features to implement
- Documentation to create or update
- Configuration changes
- Refactoring directly related to the goal

---

# Out of Scope

This issue does **not** include:

- Future enhancements
- Unrelated refactoring
- Performance optimizations
- Additional features discovered during implementation

---

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Primary objective achieved
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No unrelated changes introduced
